security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes can be manipulated without proper validation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not validate vote integrity.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of votes.
The actor can alter the vote data before submission.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust input validation for vote data and integrity checks.

description: An attacker may modify vote data before submission, potentially influencing the outcome.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of audit trail for votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks mechanisms for tracking vote origin and authenticity.

assumptions: The system does not maintain a comprehensive audit trail for votes.
The actor can cast votes anonymously.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a robust audit trail for all votes, including timestamps, user IDs, and vote details.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their participation in the governance process.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be exposed without proper authorization.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not adequately protect vote confidentiality.

assumptions: The system does not adequately protect the confidentiality of votes.
The actor may have unauthorized access to the vote data.

mitigation.strategy: Implement access controls and encryption to protect vote confidentiality.

description: An attacker may gain unauthorized access to vote information.
